Title: Use custom pickers

As a app user
I want custom pickers and popovers instead of raw browser selects
So that selection controls stay consistent with the design system

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Shared picker/popover components exist for module forms and filters.
- [ ] Accounts surfaces use the shared controls instead of bare native select UIs.

Notes: Implemented across multiple accounts surfaces; I did not audit every picker interaction path.
